title: Kenyan-Style Beef Kebabs
description: A flavorful and spicy beef kebab recipe inspired by Kenyan cuisine, perfect for grilling or broiling. Serve with a side of creamy sauce for added richness.
instructions: Preheat grill or broiler to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together creamy, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper (if using), salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the bowl and mix well.
Add the beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the beef cubes onto the beef kebabs.
Brush the grill or broiler with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill or broil the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the beef is cooked to your liking.
Serve the kebabs hot with a side of creamy sauce for added richness.
To make the creamy sauce, whisk together the creamy and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the kebabs with the creamy sauce spooned over the top.
